data.name: App_Title
data.comment: The app title shown as the window title.

data.name: Shell_ProfileLabel
data.comment: Label next to the profile dropdown in the top bar.

data.name: Profile_DropdownPlaceholder
data.comment: Placeholder shown in the profile dropdown when nothing is selected.

data.name: ManageProfiles_ButtonTooltip
data.comment: Tooltip on the gear button that opens the Manage Profiles dialog.

data.name: Preferences_ButtonTooltip
data.comment: Tooltip on the button that opens the Preferences dialog.

data.name: Launch_Button
data.comment: The Launch button in the shell top bar.

data.name: Status_GameRunning
data.comment: Status-strip label when Darktide is running.

data.name: Status_GameNotRunning
data.comment: Status-strip label when Darktide is not running.

data.name: ProfileSwitch_RunningTooltip
data.value: Darktide is running; stop it before switching profiles
data.comment: Tooltip on the profile dropdown explaining why switching is blocked.

data.name: ProfileSwitch_CreateFirstTooltip
data.comment: Tooltip on the profile dropdown when no profile exists.

data.name: ManageProfiles_Title
data.comment: Title of the Manage Profiles dialog.

data.name: ManageProfiles_NewButton
data.comment: The add-row button in the Manage Profiles dialog.

data.name: ManageProfiles_NewPlaceholder
data.comment: Placeholder in the inline add-row entry box.

data.name: ManageProfiles_RenameTooltip
data.comment: Tooltip on the pencil (rename) button on each profile row.

data.name: ManageProfiles_DeleteTooltip
data.comment: Tooltip on the trash (delete) button on each profile row.

data.name: ManageProfiles_DeleteLockedTooltip
data.value: Can't delete the active profile while Darktide is running.
data.comment: Tooltip on the trash button when it is disabled (active row held while Darktide runs).

data.name: ManageProfiles_DoneButton
data.comment: The Done button at the bottom of the Manage Profiles dialog.

data.name: ManageProfiles_DeleteTitle
data.comment: Title of the delete-profile confirmation prompt.

data.name: ManageProfiles_DeleteMessage
data.value: Delete profile {0}? This removes its mod list and staged launch root (the mod repository is untouched).
data.comment: Body of the delete-profile confirmation prompt. {0} is the profile name.

data.name: Dialog_CloseTooltip
data.comment: Tooltip + automation name on the drawn close (X) button in the shared modal title bar.

data.name: Confirm_Title
data.comment: Default title of the generic yes/no confirmation dialog.

data.name: Confirm_CancelButton
data.comment: The Cancel button in the confirm dialog.

data.name: Confirm_OkButton
data.comment: The OK / confirm button in the confirm dialog.

data.name: Preferences_Title
data.comment: Title of the Preferences dialog.

data.name: Preferences_ThemeHeader
data.comment: Header over the theme picker.

data.name: Preferences_ThemeSystem
data.comment: Theme picker option: follow the OS theme.

data.name: Preferences_ThemeDark
data.comment: Theme picker option: dark theme.

data.name: Preferences_ThemeLight
data.comment: Theme picker option: light theme.

data.name: Preferences_FontScaleHeader
data.comment: Header over the font-scale slider.

data.name: Preferences_LanguageHeader
data.comment: Header over the language dropdown.

data.name: Preferences_LanguageEnglish
data.comment: Language dropdown option: English (the only shipped language).

data.name: Preferences_DoneButton
data.comment: The Done button at the bottom of the Preferences dialog.

data.name: ModList_Header
data.comment: Neutral header for the mod list (shown when no profile is active).

data.name: ModList_Count
data.comment: Header for the mod list with the current count. {0} is the mod count.

data.name: ModList_EmptyNoProfile
data.value: Select or create a profile to manage its mods.
data.comment: Empty-state message in the mod list when no profile is active.

data.name: ModList_EmptyNoMods
data.value: No mods yet. Add a mod (button or drag-and-drop) to get started.
data.comment: Empty-state message when the active profile has no mods.

data.name: ModList_AddButtonTooltip
data.value: Add a mod to this profile
data.comment: Tooltip on the Add split button in the mod list header (the primary click opens the current mode's picker).

data.name: ModList_AddZip
data.comment: The zip-import label: the Add split button's primary label in zip mode + the zip flyout item.

data.name: ModList_AddFolder
data.comment: The folder-import label: the Add split button's primary label in folder mode + the folder flyout item.

data.name: ModList_DragDropHint
data.value: Drag mod files or folders onto the window to import (Windows only).
data.comment: Subtle hint in the no-mods empty state + the content-area tooltip, noting drag-and-drop is a Windows-only feature (XDND lands in Avalonia 12.1).

data.name: ModList_AutoSort
data.comment: Label next to the auto-sort checkbox in the mod list header.

data.name: ModList_AutoSortTooltip
data.value: Sort mods by their dependencies (dependency-based sorting is coming; currently no-op).
data.comment: Tooltip on the auto-sort checkbox. Notes that real sorting is coming; no em-dash.

data.name: ModRow_EnabledTooltip
data.comment: Tooltip on the enabled checkbox on each mod row.

data.name: ModRow_PolicyLatest
data.comment: Policy ComboBox option: track the newest release.

data.name: ModRow_PolicyPinned
data.comment: Policy ComboBox option: frozen at a specific release.

data.name: ModRow_PolicyPinnedDisplay
data.comment: Policy display text for a pinned mod (the badge / tooltip form). {0} is the pinned version tag.

data.name: ModRow_PinnedVersionPlaceholder
data.comment: Watermark / placeholder for the inline pinned-version editor.

data.name: ModRow_MoveUpTooltip
data.comment: Tooltip on the move-up button on each mod row.

data.name: ModRow_MoveDownTooltip
data.comment: Tooltip on the move-down button on each mod row.

data.name: ModRow_RemoveTooltip
data.comment: Tooltip on the trash (remove) button on each mod row.

data.name: ModRow_SourceUntracked
data.comment: Source badge text for a local / untracked mod.

data.name: ModRow_SourceNexus
data.comment: Source badge text for a Nexus Mods mod. {0} is the Nexus mod id.

data.name: ModRow_SourceGitHub
data.comment: Source badge text for a GitHub mod. {0} is the owner, {1} is the repo.

data.name: ModRow_NotFound
data.comment: Source badge text when a mod has no mod-store entry (stale profile reference).

data.name: Import_Title
data.comment: Title of the per-mod import modal.

data.name: Import_NameLabel
data.comment: Label over the mod name field in the import modal.

data.name: Import_SourceLabel
data.comment: Label over the source chooser in the import modal.

data.name: Import_SourceUntracked
data.comment: Source chooser option: untracked / local.

data.name: Import_SourceNexus
data.comment: Source chooser option: Nexus Mods.

data.name: Import_SourceGitHub
data.comment: Source chooser option: GitHub.

data.name: Import_VersionLabel
data.comment: Label over the version field in the import modal.

data.name: Import_VersionRequired
data.comment: Validation message when the version field is empty for a remote source.

data.name: Import_NexusUrlLabel
data.comment: Label over the URL field when Nexus is chosen.

data.name: Import_GitHubUrlLabel
data.comment: Label over the URL field when GitHub is chosen.

data.name: Import_UrlPlaceholderNexus
data.comment: Watermark / placeholder for the Nexus URL field.

data.name: Import_UrlPlaceholderGitHub
data.comment: Watermark / placeholder for the GitHub repo URL field.

data.name: Import_OkButton
data.comment: The OK / confirm button in the import modal.

data.name: Import_CancelButton
data.comment: The Cancel button in the import modal.

data.name: Import_UrlRequired
data.value: A URL is required for this source.
data.comment: Validation message when the URL field is empty for a remote source.

data.name: Import_UrlInvalid
data.value: This URL does not look right. Check the format and try again.
data.comment: Validation message when the URL does not parse for the chosen source.

data.name: RemoveMod_Title
data.comment: Title of the remove-mod confirmation prompt.

data.name: RemoveMod_Message
data.comment: Body of the remove-mod confirmation prompt. {0} is the mod name.
